query:
SELECT 'total' as metric, COUNT(*) as val FROM messages
UNION ALL
SELECT 'dup_groups', COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT messageId, sessionId FROM messages WHERE messageId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY messageId, sessionId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) t
UNION ALL
SELECT 'extra_rows', COALESCE(SUM(cnt - 1), 0) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM messages WHERE messageId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY messageId, sessionId HAVING cnt > 1) t;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT 'total' as metric, COUNT(*) as val FROM messages
UNION ALL
SELECT 'dup_groups', COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT messageId, sessionId FROM messages WHERE messageId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY messageId, sessionId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) t
UNION ALL
SELECT 'extra_rows', COALESCE(SUM(cnt - 1), 0) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM messages WHERE messageId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY messageId, sessionId HAVING cnt > 1) t;
